scores.correctness_notes: Covers all major points from gold standard: change/task model, fields (id, kind, summary, status, ready, spawn-time, ready-time, tasks with progress done/total), CLI commands (pebble changes, pebble tasks), API polling via get_change(), blocking wait via wait_change() mapping to /v1/changes/{id}/wait, and get_changes() with select parameter. State persistence location also mentioned.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issues: 'container.start_service()' returning a change_id is not how the ops library Container API works (it blocks/waits internally and doesn't return a change_id to the user). The 'container.get_plan()' reference in the wait_change example is irrelevant/misleading. The PEBBLE_PERSIST=never env var mention is not in gold standard and may be fabricated. The ChangeStatus.ERROR enum value and ChangeState.IN_PROGRESS/ALL enum names may not match exact ops API names. The 'Wait' status (external event awaiting) is not in gold standard. These are minor compared to the overall accuracy.
